case_title: PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC. VS. SF HOTEL MASTER TENANT LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75 SERVED SEP-26-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SF HOTEL MASTER TENANT LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF PAN-O-RAMA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY MERSMAN. DEFENDANT SF HOTEL MASTER TENANT LLC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SF HOTEL MASTER TENANT LLC $2,135.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,260.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,135.00 FILED BY PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SF HOTEL MASTER TENANT LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
